title: Valiant (disambiguation)
content:
'''Valiant''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''''[[Valiant]]''''', an [[Alif-class Longbeam|''Alif''-class Longbeam]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===[[Starship/Legends|Starships]]===
*'''''[[Valiant (Opelle)|Valiant]]''''', a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] starship captained by [[Opelle]] during the [[First Jedi Purge]]
*'''''[[Valiant (Valor-class)|Valiant]]''''', a [[Valor-class cruiser|''Valor''-class cruiser]]
*'''''[[Valiant (transport)|Valiant]]''''', a [[Valahari/Legends|Valahari]] [[Transport/Legends|transport ship]]
*'''''[[Valiant (Thranta-class War Cruiser)|Valiant]]''''', a [[Thranta-class War Cruiser|''Thranta''-class War Cruiser]]
*'''''[[Valiant (MC40a light cruiser)|Valiant]]''''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruiser]]
*'''''[[Valiant (Imperial cruiser)|Valiant]]''''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]]
*'''''[[Valiant (armored transport ship)|Valiant]]''''', an Imperial armored transport ship
*'''''[[Valiant (starship)|Valiant]]''''', an Imperial starship
*'''''[[Valiant (Victory-class)|Valiant]]''''', a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]]
*'''''[[Valiant (Nebulon-B2 frigate)|Valiant]]''''', a Rebel [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]]

===Other===
*'''[[Valiant (clone trooper)|Valiant]]''', an [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]]
